title: 雨巷青春
synopsis: 1998年夏天，高三（2）班的林小北暗恋着画画很好的苏雨晴。一个暴雨的放学午后，两人在教学楼屋檐下意外相遇躲雨。雨越下越大，两人的距离越靠越近…一段关于青春、暗恋和那个下雨天的故事。

characters.name: 林小北
characters.role: 男主角，文静内敛，喜欢文学

characters.name: 苏雨晴
characters.role: 女主角，温柔细腻，喜欢画画

scenes.title: 放学前
scenes.setting: 1998年夏天的教室，窗外乌云密布

panels.description: A 1990s Chinese high school classroom, old wooden desks, blackboard with chalk writings, dark clouds visible through window, students packing bags, summer afternoon light
panels.background: old classroom with ceiling fans, propaganda posters on wall, 1990s Chinese school style
panels.narration: 1998年夏天，高三（2）班的最后一节课结束了。窗外，乌云正悄悄聚集。

panels.description: A shy teenage boy in 1990s Chinese school uniform packing books, glancing toward a girl across the classroom, him wearing glasses, looking nervous
panels.narration: 林小北收拾好书包，目光不由自主地飘向那个熟悉的背影。

panels.description: A pretty teenage girl with ponytail in 1990s Chinese school uniform, looking out window worriedly, holding a sketchbook, noticing the dark sky
panels.background: classroom near window, rain starting outside
panels.narration: 苏雨晴看了看窗外——下雨了。她没带伞。

scenes.title: 屋檐下
scenes.setting: 教学楼的旧屋檐下，雨帘如幕

panels.description: Old school building entrance with traditional Chinese eaves, heavy rain pouring down like a curtain, two students standing under the narrow roof, 1990s Chinese school architecture
panels.background: rainy school campus, wet concrete ground, old fashioned school gate
panels.narration: 雨越下越大。苏雨晴站在教学楼门口，看着雨帘发愁。

panels.description: Two Chinese high school students standing side by side under narrow eaves, rain splashing near them, awkward distance between boy and girl, both in school uniforms
panels.background: school entrance, raining heavily, wet ground with puddles
panels.narration: 林小北鼓起勇气，默默站到了她旁边。

panels.description: Close up of rain droplets on a girl's shoulder, school uniform getting wet, a boy's hand holding a notebook hesitating whether to offer it as shelter
panels.background: rainy atmosphere, droplets visible in air
panels.narration: 雨飘进来，打湿了她的肩膀。他想说什么，话到嘴边又咽了回去。

scenes.title: 靠近
scenes.setting: 雨更大了，两人不自觉地靠近

panels.description: Two teenagers standing closer now, shoulders almost touching, boy awkwardly holding a textbook over their heads as makeshift shelter, rain pouring around them
panels.narration: 雨更大了。林小北鼓起勇气，把课本举在了两人头顶。

panels.description: Close up of a teenage boy and girl looking at each other, faces very close, rain droplets on glasses, girl's eyes reflecting shyness and warmth
panels.narration: 近距离的瞬间，他闻到了她发梢淡淡的洗发水香味。

dialogue.林小北: 嗯。你是…苏雨晴，画画很好的那个。

panels.description: Rain lightening, sunlight breaking through clouds, girl smiling at boy, boy looking relieved and happy, rainbow visible in distance
panels.background: post-rain sky, wet but bright campus, rainbow arc
panels.narration: 雨渐渐小了。一道彩虹悄然挂在天边。

scenes.title: 同行
scenes.setting: 雨后的校园小径，夕阳微露

panels.description: A tree-lined path on a Chinese campus after rain, wet ground reflecting sunlight, two teenagers walking side by side, school bags on backs, summer greenery
panels.background: campus path with old trees, wet leaves glistening
panels.narration: 两人并肩走在雨后湿漉漉的校园小路上。

panels.description: Close up of a sketchbook opened to reveal a beautiful pencil drawing of a boy reading under a tree, girl's hand holding the sketchbook
panels.background: soft afternoon light filtering through trees
panels.narration: 她打开速写本，里面画着一个在梧桐树下看书的少年。原来她早就注意到了他。

dialogue.苏雨晴: 我见过你——你在老梧桐下看书，我画过你。

panels.description: Golden sunset light, two teenagers silhouetted against the warm sky, standing at a crossroad, smiling at each other, a gentle beginning of young love
panels.background: golden hour campus, beautiful sunset after rain
panels.narration: 那个夏天，那个下雨天，一段青春的故事，刚刚开始。
